content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09A","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09A named J09A_temp.
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG.
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU".
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Export the final data from the table as CSV file named J09A including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
8. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com.
9. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09A named J09A_temp.
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG.
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU".
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Export the final data from the table as CSV file named J09A including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
8. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com.
9. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

args.sqlite_command:
CREATE TABLE J09A_temp AS
SELECT *
FROM decision_table
WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09A%';
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;

WITH eq_counts AS (
  SELECT HAUS, COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) AS eq_count
  FROM J09A_temp
  GROUP BY HAUS
)
UPDATE J09A_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
  WHEN ec.eq_count < 3 THEN 'KSA'
  ELSE 'EVU'
END
FROM eq_counts ec
WHERE J09A_temp.HAUS = ec.HAUS;

CREATE TABLE J09A_joined AS
SELECT 
  dt.HAUS,
  dt.ANLAGE,
  dt.ABLEINH,
  dt.TOUR,
  dt.ME_MA_ID,
  dt.CITY1,
  dt.CITY2,
  dt.HOUSE_NUM1,
  dt.POST_CODE1,
  dt.EQUNR,
  dt.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
  eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No."
FROM J09A_temp dt
LEFT JOIN eablg
  ON eablg.Installation = dt.ANLAGE;

CREATE TABLE J09A_enriched AS
WITH sales AS (
  SELECT 
    j.*, 
    s.TITLE AS s_TITLE,
    s.FORENAME AS s_FORENAME,
    s.SURNAME AS s_SURNAME,
    s.STREET AS s_STREET,
    s.STREETNO AS s_STREETNO,
    s.CITY1 AS s_CITY1,
    s.CITY2 AS s_CITY2,
    s.POST_CODE1 AS s_POST_CODE1,
    s.EMAIL AS s_EMAIL
  FROM J09A_joined j
  LEFT JOIN sales_master s
    ON s.EQUNR = j.EQUNR
),
net AS (
  SELECT 
    j.*, 
    n.TITLE AS n_TITLE,
    n.FORENAME AS n_FORENAME,
    n.SURNAME AS n_SURNAME,
    n.STREET AS n_STREET,
    n.STREETNO AS n_STREETNO,
    n.CITY1 AS n_CITY1,
    n.CITY2 AS n_CITY2,
    n.POST_CODE1 AS n_POST_CODE1,
    n.EMAIL AS n_EMAIL
  FROM J09A_joined j
  LEFT JOIN net_master n
    ON n.EQUNR = j.EQUNR
)
SELECT 
  COALESCE(s."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", n."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.") AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  COALESCE(s.HAUS, n.HAUS) AS HAUS,
  COALESCE(s.ANLAGE, n.ANLAGE) AS ANLAGE,
  COALESCE(s.ME_MA_ID, n.ME_MA_ID) AS ME_MA_ID,
  COALESCE(s.EQUNR, n.EQUNR) AS EQUNR,
  COALESCE(s.CITY1, n.CITY1) AS CITY1,
  COALESCE(s.CITY2, n.CITY2) AS CITY2,
  COALESCE(s.HOUSE_NUM1, n.HOUSE_NUM1) AS HOUSE_NUM1,
  COALESCE(s.POST_CODE1, n.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1,
  COALESCE(s.ENTSCHEIDUNG, n.ENTSCHEIDUNG) AS ENTSCHEIDUNG,
  CASE WHEN s.s_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.s_TITLE ELSE n.n_TITLE END AS TITLE,
  CASE WHEN s.s_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.s_FORENAME ELSE n.n_FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
  CASE WHEN s.s_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.s_SURNAME ELSE n.n_SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
  CASE WHEN s.s_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.s_STREET ELSE n.n_STREET END AS STREET,
  CASE WHEN s.s_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.s_STREETNO ELSE n.n_STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
  CASE WHEN s.s_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.s_POST_CODE1 ELSE n.n_POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1_ADDR,
  CASE WHEN s.s_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.s_CITY1 ELSE n.n_CITY1 END AS CITY1_ADDR,
  CASE WHEN s.s_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.s_CITY2 ELSE n.n_CITY2 END AS CITY2_ADDR,
  CASE WHEN s.s_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.s_EMAIL ELSE n.n_EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM sales s
JOIN net n ON s.EQUNR = n.EQUNR;

CREATE TABLE J09A_enriched AS
SELECT
  j."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  j.HAUS,
  j.ANLAGE,
  j.ME_MA_ID,
  j.EQUNR,
  j.HOUSE_NUM1,
  j.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
  CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.TITLE ELSE n.TITLE END AS TITLE,
  CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.FORENAME ELSE n.FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
  CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.SURNAME ELSE n.SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
  CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREET ELSE n.STREET END AS STREET,
  CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREETNO ELSE n.STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
  CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.POST_CODE1 ELSE n.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
  CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY1 ELSE n.CITY1 END AS CITY1,
  CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY2 ELSE n.CITY2 END AS CITY2,
  CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.EMAIL ELSE n.EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM J09A_joined j
LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON s.EQUNR = j.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN net_master n ON n.EQUNR = j.EQUNR AND s.EQUNR IS NULL;

args.sql_query:
SELECT
  "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  HAUS,
  ANLAGE,
  ME_MA_ID,
  EQUNR,
  HOUSE_NUM1,
  ENTSCHEIDUNG,
  TITLE,
  FORENAME,
  SURNAME,
  STREET,
  STREETNO,
  POST_CODE1,
  CITY1,
  CITY2,
  EMAIL
FROM J09A_enriched;

args.email:
Please find attached the J09A meter reading decision data for the EVU team.

Best regards,
Automated Process System

kwargs.content:
The process for `process_rule_id = 'J09A'` has been executed:

1. Created temporary table `J09A_temp` from `decision_table` for TOURS starting with `J09A`.
2. Added column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` and populated it with:
   - `KSA` where a HAUS has fewer than 3 distinct EQUNR.
   - `EVU` otherwise.
3. Joined with `eablg` via `ANLAGE` (INSTALLATION) into `J09A_joined`.
4. Joined with `sales_master` and `net_master` via `EQUNR`, preferring sales data where present and otherwise using net data, into `J09A_enriched`.
5. Exported the final data as `J09A.csv` with the requested columns.
6. Sent the CSV file to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
7. Dropped the temporary table `J09A_temp`.

If you want, I can also show you the exact SQL used or the first few rows of the result.
